issue.title: Heartbeat refill lane 1309: remaining Python asset sweep 9/10

commands: find src/bigclaw tests scripts bigclaw-go/scripts -type f -name '*.py' 2>/dev/null | sort

blocker.summary: The repository-wide physical Python file count was already zero in this workspace before BIG-GO-1309 changes.

notes: This lane documents an empty remaining Python asset inventory and hardens the Go-only state with regression coverage.
The branch baseline was already Python-free, so this lane strengthens regression coverage and refreshes validation evidence rather than removing in-branch Python files.
Lane execution started from repository HEAD `389c32cf` and validated the zero-Python baseline on branch `BIG-GO-1309`.
This refresh reran the recorded lane validation commands on 2026-04-05 and kept the change set scoped to lane-owned artifacts.
